LandingPage.heroDesc: Personalized learning paths generated by Google Gemini. Learn faster, smarter, and at your own pace.
LandingPage.mockupMessage: You're ahead of schedule! Focus on attention mechanisms today — you'll finish early.
LandingPage.featuresDesc: Everything you need to learn faster and teach smarter — powered by AI.
LandingPage.feature1Desc: Enter any topic and Gemini 1.5 Pro builds a structured 30-day roadmap tailored to your exact goals and current level.
LandingPage.feature2Desc: Teachers get real-time dashboards tracking engagement, mastery scores, and learning velocity across every student.
LandingPage.feature3Desc: Dynamic assessments that recalibrate difficulty after every answer, keeping learners in their optimal challenge zone.
LandingPage.howTitle: From zero to mastery in 3 steps
LandingPage.howDesc: From idea to mastery in minutes with AI
LandingPage.step1Desc: Tell Gemini what you want to master. Any topic, any level, any language.
LandingPage.step2Desc: Get a personalized 30-day roadmap with lessons, quizzes & milestones in seconds.
LandingPage.step3Desc: Adaptive quizzes and teacher insights keep you on track every single day.
LandingPage.test1Text: My IELTS score jumped from 6.0 to 7.5 in 45 days. The roadmap felt like having a private tutor.
LandingPage.test2Text: I can now see exactly where each student is struggling before the exam — this changed everything.
LandingPage.test3Text: I learned Python fundamentals in 3 weeks while working full-time. The AI kept my pace perfect.
LandingPage.ctaTitle: Ready to transform how you learn?
LandingPage.ctaDesc: Join thousands of learners already using AI-powered education.
LandingPage.noCreditCard: No credit card required · Free forever for students
